testcase.name: config.js > config shape > should have all required config keys
config.js > config shape > should have maxRetries set to 5
config.js > config shape > should have a truthy openaiApiKey
config.js > config shape > should have a valid apiBaseUrl format
config.js > default values > should default apiBaseUrl to openai when env is not set
config.js > default values > should default modelName to gpt-4o when env is not set
config.js > workspaceDir > should be a non-empty string
config.js > workspaceDir > should not contain literal tilde (already expanded)
config.js > expandHome function logic > should expand ~ to homedir
config.js > expandHome function logic > should expand ~/path to homedir/path
config.js > expandHome function logic > should expand ~\path on Windows
config.js > expandHome function logic > should not modify absolute paths
config.js > expandHome function logic > should return null/undefined/empty unchanged
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove a read-file tag with body
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove a self-closing read-file tag
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove a write-file tag with multiline content
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should preserve text outside tool tags
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove update-file tag
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove list-path tag
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove run-command tag
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove run-command with attributes
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove multiple different tool tags
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should handle text with no tool tags
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should handle empty string
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should not be confused by similar-looking non-tool text
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should remove the tool tag even with extra whitespace in attributes
ExecutorAgent - stripToolTags > should handle self-closing write-file tag
PlannerAgent > buildMessages > should return an array with SystemMessage and HumanMessage
PlannerAgent > buildMessages > should include the user prompt in the HumanMessage
PlannerAgent > buildMessages > should include 立法 standard instructions in the SystemMessage
PlannerAgent > buildMessages > should instruct to output pure JSON array format
PlannerAgent > buildMessages > should have iron rules in system prompt
PlannerAgent > parseCriteria > should parse a valid JSON array
PlannerAgent > parseCriteria > should strip markdown code fences
PlannerAgent > parseCriteria > should handle JSON with only backticks
PlannerAgent > parseCriteria > should return a fallback criteria on invalid JSON
PlannerAgent > parseCriteria > should return a fallback on empty string
PlannerAgent > parseCriteria > should parse multiple criteria
PlannerAgent > parseCriteria > should handle JSON with whitespace
XunMingScheduler - full pipeline > processQuery() should complete full pipeline for a simple math question

testcase.name: XunMingScheduler - full pipeline > inspectorVerdict should handle JSON evidence correctly
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse a self-closing read-file tag
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse a write-file tag with body content
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse update-file with line attribute
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse update-file with from/to attributes
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse update-file with replace attribute
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse list-path tag
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse run-command tag
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse run-command with bg attribute
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse run-command check variant
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse multiple tool calls in one text
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should deduplicate identical tool calls
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should return empty array for text without tool calls
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should handle empty text
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should parse self-closing write-file tag (edge case)
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should return unique id for each call
tools/index.js > parseToolCalls > should handle multiline body content in write-file
tools/index.js > toolCallMap > should have all 5 tools defined
tools/index.js > toolCallMap > should mark self-closing tools correctly
tools/index.js > toolCallMap > should mark path-requiring tools correctly
tools/index.js > buildToolsPrompt > should return a non-empty string
tools/index.js > buildToolsPrompt > should include all tool names
tools/index.js > buildToolsPrompt > should include background execution instructions
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 1: clean JSON parse > should parse a passed verdict correctly
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 1: clean JSON parse > should parse a failed verdict correctly
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 1: clean JSON parse > should strip markdown code fences
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 1: clean JSON parse > should handle JSON embedded in other text
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 1: clean JSON parse > should handle JSON with nested braces (e.g. code in reason)
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 2: keyword fallback > should detect passed:true as substring
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 2: keyword fallback > should detect passed:true with space
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 2: keyword fallback > should detect passed:false as substring
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 2: keyword fallback > should handle Chinese keyword 通过 without 未通过
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 2: keyword fallback > should exclude 驳回 from 通过 keyword match (falls to default pass)
testcase.system-err: [Verifier] 无法解析判决输出，原文: 审查结论：驳回，存在严重问题。

testcase.name: VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 2: keyword fallback > should exclude 未通过 from 通过 keyword match (falls to default pass)
testcase.system-err: [Verifier] 无法解析判决输出，原文: 方案未通过审核。

testcase.name: VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 3: default fallback > should default to passed when format is unrecognizable
testcase.system-err: [Verifier] 无法解析判决输出，原文: The verdict is unclear from this output.

testcase.name: VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > Strategy 3: default fallback > should default to passed for empty string
testcase.system-err: [Verifier] 无法解析判决输出，原文:

testcase.name: VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > edge cases > should handle JSON with only opening brace
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > edge cases > should not be fooled by false positives in reason
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > should correctly recognize a passed JSON with complex reason
VerifierAgent > parseVerdict > should correctly recognize a failed JSON with specific criteria reference
VerifierAgent > buildMessages > should return an array with SystemMessage and HumanMessage
VerifierAgent > buildMessages > should include criteria in the SystemMessage
VerifierAgent > buildMessages > should include output in the HumanMessage
VerifierAgent > buildMessages > should include format hint when provided
VerifierAgent > buildMessages > should include key role descriptions
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > JSON parsing path > should return passed:true when all items pass
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > JSON parsing path > should return passed:false when any item fails
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > JSON parsing path > should handle JSON without markdown fences
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > JSON parsing path > should handle JSON with surrounding text
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > JSON parsing path > should handle JSON with embedded text before array
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > JSON parsing path > should handle empty JSON array
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > JSON parsing path > should truncate reason to ~300 chars on failure
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Emoji fallback path > should pass when ✅ present and no ❌
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Emoji fallback path > should fail when ❌ present
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Emoji fallback path > should fail when ❌ count exceeds ✅ count
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Keyword fallback path > should fail when 未满足 is present
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Keyword fallback path > should fail when 问题 is present
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Keyword fallback path > should fail when 错误 is present
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Keyword fallback path > should pass when none of the negative keywords are present
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Edge cases > should handle empty evidence text
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Edge cases > should handle null/undefined evidence text
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Edge cases > should handle text with only whitespace
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Edge cases > should handle JSON with items missing the passed field
XunMingScheduler - inspectorVerdict > Edge cases > should handle malformed JSON gracefully
